positive: A highly detailed, stylized illustration of interconnected mystical flora and celestial fauna, such as iridescent hummingbirds intertwined with glowing phosphorescent vines and ancient stylized moon moths. The composition must be centrally focused, featuring clean, strong silhouettes against a dark, cosmic background. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, ethereal teal, and luminous gold accents. The art style should be neo-vintage botanical engraving mixed with psychedelic stained glass textures. Emphasis on deep contrast, sharp edges, and perfect negative space for clean printing on apparel. Intricate line work, symmetrical elements, perfect composition, vector art quality.
